texts.orig: NON RESIDENT NET RATES: DELUXE ROOMS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Day conferences will be charged at Kshs. 3,200 per person
texts.text: Day conferences will be charged at Kshs. 3,200 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children 2 years and below are Free of charge (while sharing with adults)
texts.text: Children 2 years and below are Free of charge (while sharing with adults)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A child 9 years and below sharing with 2 adults pays 50% of half twin rate.
texts.text: A child 9 years and below sharing with 2 adults pays 50% of half twin rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A child sharing with 1 adult in a room pays 100% of adult rate.
texts.text: A child sharing with 1 adult in a room pays 100% of adult rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children having exclusive use of the room pay 100% of the adult rate
texts.text: Children having exclusive use of the room pay 100% of the adult rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A supplement will be levied over;
texts.text: A supplement will be levied over;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Easter weekend, Friday Saturday and Sunday
texts.text: Easter weekend, Friday Saturday and Sunday

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The rate for resident adults & children will Kshs. 2,000 & Kshs. 1, 500 per person per night respectively.
texts.text: The rate for resident adults & children will Kshs. 2,000 & Kshs. 1, 500 per person per night respectively.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Whereas the Non-Resident rate will be $30 & $20 for adults and children respectively, per person per night.
texts.text: Whereas the Non-Resident rate will be $30 & $20 for adults and children respectively, per person per night.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Picnic Lunch / Extra Lunch per person- Kshs. 2,500
texts.text: Picnic Lunch / Extra Lunch per person- Kshs. 2,500

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Picnic Lunch / Extra Lunch per person- USD 30
texts.text: Picnic Lunch / Extra Lunch per person- USD 30

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A maximum of 4 single rooms will be given at single rate the rest double rate will apply per booking.
texts.text: A maximum of 4 single rooms will be given at single rate the rest double rate will apply per booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: One pax free for every 15 paying clients. This rate is not applicable over promotional periods.
texts.text: One pax free for every 15 paying clients. This rate is not applicable over promotional periods.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Game Drives @ $ 200 per vehicle in a minivan to Lake Nakuru National Park and $300 by 4 x 4 land cruiser
texts.text: Game Drives @ $ 200 per vehicle in a minivan to Lake Nakuru National Park and $300 by 4 x 4 land cruiser

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All block bookings are to be confirmed by the Agent a minimum of 60 days prior to arrival at the lodge. Room lists must be submitted to the lodge's reservations department a minimum of 30 days prior to arrival. Bookings made and not paid for will be released at the
texts.text: All block bookings are to be confirmed by the Agent a minimum of 60 days prior to arrival at the lodge. Room lists must be submitted to the lodge's reservations department a minimum of 30 days prior to arrival. Bookings made and not paid for will be released at the

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Discretion of the lodge, without notice to the agent if payment is not received 30 days in advance of the booking.
texts.text: Discretion of the lodge, without notice to the agent if payment is not received 30 days in advance of the booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. For bookings cancelled or amended between 60 and 35 days from noon on the date of arrival, 25% of the applicable rate per bed night will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings cancelled or amended between 60 and 35 days from noon on the date of arrival, 25% of the applicable rate per bed night will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. For bookings cancelled or amended between 34 and 22 days from noon on the date of arrival, 50% of the applicable rate per bed night will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings cancelled or amended between 34 and 22 days from noon on the date of arrival, 50% of the applicable rate per bed night will be charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 3. In case of cancellation or amendment within 14 days from noon of the date of arrival 75% of the value of booking will be charged 4. In case of cancellation or amendment in less than 14 days from noon on the date of arrival or in case of 'NO SHOW' will attract a 100% cancellation.
texts.text: 3. In case of cancellation or amendment within 14 days from noon of the date of arrival 75% of the value of booking will be charged 4. In case of cancellation or amendment in less than 14 days from noon on the date of arrival or in case of 'NO SHOW' will attract a 100% cancellation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance 30 days prior to the arrival of the clients. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.
texts.text: A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance 30 days prior to the arrival of the clients. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All payments made by cheque must be cleared prior to the arrival of the clients. In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as "unpaid" for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof.
texts.text: All payments made by cheque must be cleared prior to the arrival of the clients. In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as "unpaid" for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The agent agrees to pay any and all costs, including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by The Pelican Lodge in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default payment. Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by PELICAN LODGE accounts department within 4 days of invoicing and the only amount in dispute may be deducted from the invoice and Payment due, which must be made within the specific time limit. Default of undisputed payment may result in Agent's clients being refused admission to the lodge until payment is made. Consistent default will result in cancellation of this agreement.
texts.text: The agent agrees to pay any and all costs, including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by The Pelican Lodge in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default payment. Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by PELICAN LODGE accounts department within 4 days of invoicing and the only amount in dispute may be deducted from the invoice and Payment due, which must be made within the specific time limit. Default of undisputed payment may result in Agent's clients being refused admission to the lodge until payment is made. Consistent default will result in cancellation of this agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The contractual rates mentioned in this contract are subject to change without any notice in the event of an increase in local taxes and government levy. However, every effort will be made to maintain them within the contractual period.
texts.text: The contractual rates mentioned in this contract are subject to change without any notice in the event of an increase in local taxes and government levy. However, every effort will be made to maintain them within the contractual period.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The agent confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.
texts.text: The agent confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Bush breakfast- $ 35 per person- (Minimum 4 people) Bush dinners- $ 35 per person- (Minimum 4 people)includes outside dinner set up, bottle of wine and bonfire.
texts.text: Bush breakfast- $ 35 per person- (Minimum 4 people) Bush dinners- $ 35 per person- (Minimum 4 people)includes outside dinner set up, bottle of wine and bonfire.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Full day Game Drive / Return airstrip transfers $ 200 in a minivan with pop up roof &
texts.text: Full day Game Drive / Return airstrip transfers $ 200 in a minivan with pop up roof &

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: $ 350 in a land cruiser. Price is per vehicle & per day.
texts.text: $ 350 in a land cruiser. Price is per vehicle & per day.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Free for children below 3 years of age 50% of the per person sharing rates.
texts.text: Free for children below 3 years of age 50% of the per person sharing rates.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children aged 3 to 9 years old sharing with two parents pay
texts.text: Children aged 3 to 9 years old sharing with two parents pay

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: One kid sharing with one adult pays the double rate.
texts.text: One kid sharing with one adult pays the double rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children from 10 years and above are considered as adults. Children having exclusive use of tented room - 100% of the contract.
texts.text: Children from 10 years and above are considered as adults. Children having exclusive use of tented room - 100% of the contract.

Room lists must be submitted to the camp's reservations departments a minimum of 30 days prior to arrival. Bookings done and not paid for will be released at the discretion of the camp, without notice.

texts.label: list_item
